name: CREE INC.  DL-,00125
summary: Cree, Inc. (now known as Wolfspeed) is a manufacturer of wide bandgap semiconductors focused on silicon carbide and gallium nitride materials and devices. The company produces power and RF semiconductors for applications such as electric vehicles, fast charging, 5G, renewable energy and storage, and industrial power. Wolfspeed is headquartered in Durham, North Carolina, USA.
